title: Auction of State Government Securities
description: The following State Governments have offered to sell stock by way of auction, for an aggregate amount of ₹18,600 Crore (Face Value). Sr. No. State Amount to be raised (₹ Crore) Tenor(Year) Type of Auction 1. Andhra Pradesh 2200 Re-issue of 7.96% Andhra Pradesh SGS 2038 issued on April 08, 2026 Price 2200 Re-issue of 8.07% Andhra Pradesh SGS 2051 issued on April 08, 2026 Price 2. Maharashtra 800 Re-issue of 7.35% Maharashtra SGS 2031 issued on April 08, 2026 Price 1600 Re-issue of 7.9
